title: App install and uninstall events / webhooks?

posts.author: rbabayoff (Ronen Babayoff @ Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there,

Would really love to see webhooks for app install and uninstall events, to track churn.

I can get by by tracking lack off app usage, but an insight into a potential bad first time user experience would probably be tracked best by getting insight into users that uninstalled the app shorty after they installed it.

Also, install events would let me get insight into people that installed the app but don’t know what to do from there, just because they didn’t add my app’s board view.

Thanks,
Ronen
Eazyform

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @rbabayoff - this is something we’re aware of developers asking for, and something we’re hoping to implement soon. However we don’t quite have an ETA for this just yet.

-Daniel
